method_summary: The paper introduces a benchmark called Sola-Visibility-ISPM to evaluate agentic AI systems on Identity Security Posture Management tasks, defining nine operational dimensions for assessment.
key_innovation: The creation of the first standardized benchmark specifically for evaluating agentic AI's ability to perform core ISPM tasks over real, enterprise-grade identity data.
title: Sola-Visibility-ISPM: Benchmarking Agentic AI for Identity Security Posture Management Visibility
